heading: United States compliance with its nuclear nonproliferation treaty obligations
label: 8004 United States compliance with its nuclear nonproliferation treaty obligations
text: Nothing in this chapter constitutes authority for any action in violation of an obligation of the United States under the NPT.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title I of , , , which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of title I to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 109–401120 Stat. 2726section 8001 of this titleDec. 18, 2006
